title: hieracium bifidum subsp. psammogenes
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. psammogenes, also known as psammogenes hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium bifidum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. psammogenes include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall health.
